TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Carapongay Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Carapongay a niyaro', 33 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 82 ko sa'osi no tamdaw . 73% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 60 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 27% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 22 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 62%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦarapo~uŋaj itiniaj i ʦħaŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦarapo~uŋaj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw . **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Carapongay Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Carapongay a niyaro', 33 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 82 ko sa'osi no tamdaw . 73% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 60 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 27% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 22 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 62%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦarapo~uŋaj itiniaj i ʦħaŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦarapo~uŋaj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw . **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
